    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    H

    HeaderInterceptor - Class in com.habbashx.Interceptor
    Interceptor that reads the Headers annotation on the invoked method and injects the declared header strings into the MethodContext before the request is sent.
    HeaderInterceptor(MethodCache) - Constructor for class com.habbashx.Interceptor.HeaderInterceptor
     
    headers(String[]) - Method in class com.habbashx.proxy.MethodContext.MethodContextBuilder
     
    Headers - Annotation Interface in com.habbashx.annotation
    Declares one or more static HTTP headers to be sent with a request.
    HttpException - Exception Class in com.habbashx.exception
    Unchecked exception thrown when an HTTP request fails at the transport layer.
    HttpException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class com.habbashx.exception.HttpException
    Creates an HttpException with a descriptive message and the root cause.
    HttpExecutor - Class in com.habbashx.executors
    Concrete Executor that dispatches HTTP requests via RequestRegistry and deserializes the raw JSON response using a JsonSerializer.
    HttpExecutor(RequestRegistry, JsonSerializer) - Constructor for class com.habbashx.executors.HttpExecutor
     
    HttpMethod - Enum Class in com.habbashx.request
    Enumeration of the HTTP methods supported by the framework.
